exercises.stem: I ___ a shower when the telephone rang.
exercises.analysis: when 引导的时间状语从句中，主句用过去进行时表示正在进行的动作。I 用 was。

exercises.stem: While she ___ dinner, her father was reading the newspaper.
exercises.analysis: while 引导的从句用过去进行时，表示同时进行的动作。she 用 was。
at 10:00 yesterday morning 表示过去某时刻，用过去进行时。they 用 were。

exercises.stem: The sentence "While I was sleeping, the phone rings." is correct.
exercises.analysis: while 引导的从句用过去进行时，主句也应该用过去时态。正确句子是：While I was sleeping, the phone rang.

segments: At this time yesterday, I ___1___ (read) a book.
While he ___2___ (watch) TV, his wife was cooking.
exercises.analysis: at this time yesterday 表示过去某时刻，用过去进行时。while 引导的从句也用过去进行时。

exercises.question: 用 when 或 while 填空，并说明区别：___ I was walking to school, I saw an old friend. / ___ I was reading, my brother was playing games.
exercises.referenceAnswer: When I was walking to school, I saw an old friend. / While I was reading, my brother was playing games. 区别：when 引导的从句用一般过去时（saw），while 引导的从句用过去进行时（was playing），表示同时进行的动作。
scoringPoints: 正确使用 When + 过去进行时，主句用一般过去时
正确使用 While + 过去进行时
能解释 when 和 while 的区别
